1.name: Ignis Fatuus
1.description: Create a motionless illusion that affects one of the five senses.

2.name: Fata Morgana
2.description: Create a motionless illusion that can affect any of the five senses.

3.name: Apparition
3.description: Add motion to an illusion created by Ignis Fatuus or Fata Morgana.

4.name: Permanency
4.description: Make an illusion created by Chimerstry last until dismissed.

5.name: Horrid Reality
5.description: Places the mind of the victim in an illusionary world of the vampire's creation.

6.name: False Resonance
6.description: Disguise one's thoughts and aura from other attempts to read them.

6.name: Fata Amria
6.description: Curse a target with a recurring illusion that interferes with them.

6.name: Fatuus Mastery
6.description: No longer spend Willpower or blood points for the first three levels of Chimerstry, require less concentration to maintain illusions. Illusions manifest in the Penumbra as well as the Shadowlands.

6.name: Horrid Blade of the Demons
6.description: Create a dangerous weapon out of nothing.
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 146
Libellus Sanguinis 4: Thieves in the Night Pg. 34

6.name: Subtle Spy
6.description: Impart a piece of the vampire's consciousness into an illusion which can be absorbed later to learn all the illusion witnessed.

6.name: Shared Nightmare
6.description: As Horrid Reality, except it affects multiple people.

6.name: Truth's Essence
6.description: Reveal as falsehoods other uses of Chimerstry or Obfuscate.
references: Libellus Sanguinis 4: Thieves in the Night Pg. 34

7.name: Aid of the Gandharvas
7.description: Make everything in a room seem luxurious and splendid.
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 147

7.name: Far Fatuus
7.description: Create illusions anywhere you can visualize.

7.name: Interrupt Reality
7.description: Make something that is real seem impossible or fake.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 206

7.name: Suspension of Disbelief
7.description: Make an illusion seem completely real or what is real seem unbelievable.

8.name: Fantasy World
8.description: Place a target in an illusionary world in their mind.

8.name: Occlusion
8.description: Control how a single target's or group's senses work.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 207

8.name: Pseudo Blindness
8.description: See through almost all falsehoods including Fae Seemings.

8.name: Sensory Overload
8.description: Incapacitate a target by overstimulating their senses.

8.name: Visions from the Asura
8.description: Assault a target with constant illusions, making it nearly impossible to know what is real or not.
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 147

9.name: Mayaparisatya
9.description: Temporarily make an illusion completely real or alter a person or object that already exists, possibly even erasing them from existence.

9.name: Sensory Deprivation
9.description: Make a victim unable to use any of their senses, locking them out from the world.

9.name: Truths of the Universe
9.description: Make a created illusion permanently real.
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 148

10.name: Reality
10.description: Trap a victim in an alternate reality of your creation.
